subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. Whoso turneth toward the Most Sublime Horizon on this Day must needs be uplifted thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی توجه الی الافق الاعلی فی هذا الیوم ینبغی ان یرتفع به
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @the power of words; of speech
